symptom: Fragment ion validation not yet implemented: wrong chemical annotations that are consistent with the measured parent mass will pass the parent-mass-matching filter; future versions should check if observed fragment m/z ratios match the in silico fragmentation of the assigned structure.

PubChem lookup ambiguity: compound names with multiple IUPAC matches or synonyms may return an incorrect structure; manual inspection or post-hoc curation of high-uncertainty derivations is recommended.

Metadata field standardization incomplete: instrument type, collision energy, and other acquisition parameters are not yet harmonized, limiting future re-use of spectra across different acquisition contexts.

Salt/adduct heuristics context-dependent: repair logic for common salt combinations (e.g., [M+Na]+ from [M+H]+ precursor) may not generalize across all compound classes or ionization methods; validation on diverse chemical space is ongoing.
